internal.content:
---
title: IBM Fusion AI
description: IBM Fusion AI
tabs: [Overview, Tutorials, Resources]
---

import { principlesSection } from '../../styles/Grid.module.scss';
import { Insights } from '@carbon/pictograms-react';

<PageDescription>

Hands-on tutorials for IBM Fusion AI that guide developers and platform teams through real-world deployment and operational workflows.

</PageDescription>

<Row className="resource-card-group-3-across">

  <Column colMd={4} colLg={4} noGutterSm>
    <ResourceCard
      subTitle="Tutorial"
      title="GitOps-Driven Installation of Red Hat OpenShift AI on IBM Fusion with Argo CD"
      aspectRatio="2:1"
      actionIcon="launch"
      href="https://github.com/IBM/storage-fusion/blob/master/AI/fusion-openshift-ai/README.md"
    />
  </Column>

  <Column colMd={4} colLg={4} noGutterSm>
    <ResourceCard
      subTitle="Tutorial"
      title="GitOps-Driven Model Serving on Red Hat OpenShift AI with OpenShift GitOps (Argo CD) on IBM Fusion HCI"
      aspectRatio="2:1"
      actionIcon="launch"
      href="https://github.com/IBM/storage-fusion/blob/master/AI/fusion-model-serving/README.md"
    />
  </Column>

  <Column colMd={4} colLg={4} noGutterSm>
    <ResourceCard
      subTitle="Tutorial"
      title="Accelerating Content Aware Storage Deployments"
      aspectRatio="2:1"
      actionIcon="launch"
      href="https://community.ibm.com/community/user/blogs/jose-ortiz1/2026/01/29/accelerating-content-aware-storage-deployments"
    />
  </Column>

</Row>

---

import { principlesSection } from '../../styles/Grid.module.scss';
